name: CRADS2023CodeSystem
title: CT Colonography Reporting and Data System (C-RADS)
description: Codes for C-RADS v2023 colorectal finding categories.

concept.display: C-RADS Category 0 - Inadequate study/awaiting prior comparisons
C-RADS Category 1 - Normal colon or benign lesion: continue routine screening
C-RADS Category 2 - Intermediate polyp or indeterminate finding: surveillance or colonoscopy recommended
C-RADS Category 3 - Polyp, possibly advanced adenoma: follow-up colonoscopy recommended
C-RADS Category 4 - Colonic mass, likely malignant: surgical consultation recommended
